name: Alper Consultoria e Corretora de Seguros S.A.
summary: Alper Consultoria e Corretora de Seguros S.A. operates as a diversified insurance brokerage company in Brazil. The company offers personal insurance products, including property insurance, such as residential, marine / aviation hull, artwork, and rural insurance; auto insurance; personal accident, life, travel, health, dental, education, and loans insurance; liability; and extended guarantee, protected purse, electro-portable, and assistance insurance products. It also provides corporate insurance products comprising aviation, rural, lost profits, and operating risks insurance; transport insurance; Group health, dental, group life, and personal accident, as well as education, private pension, and travel insurance; performance bonds, credit, and lease guarantee insurance; and engineering risks insurance; as well as reinsurance products. The company was formerly known as BR Insurance Corretora de Seguros S.A. and changed its name to Alper Consultoria e Corretora de Seguros S.A. in December 2018. Alper Consultoria e Corretora de Seguros S.A. is headquartered in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
